headline: Is Intuit Inc. (INTU) A stock that could 10x by 2030 Amid Restructuring and TurboTax Hit?
summary: Intuit Inc. (NASDAQ:INTU) is one of the stocks that could 10x by 2030. On May 26, Mizuho reiterated an Outperform rating on Intuit Inc. (NASDAQ:INTU) but cut the price target to $500 from $600. The significant price target cut is in response to Intuit lowering its annual revenue forecast for TurboTax, its tax filing software. […]

headline: Is Intuit’s Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
summary: While Intuit has struggled to keep up with the broader S&P 500 Index over the past year, Wall Street analysts remain highly bullish about the stock’s prospects.

headline: What Might The Federal Reserve Decide After May 2026's Job Report?
